title: cr_search_registry - arguments
description: Find carriers and brokers in the Cipher & Row registry by legal name or identifier (MC, USDOT, CAB, CVOR, CTQ, NSC, CR ID). Returns a list of matches with identity only - legal name, identifiers, country, and claim status - so you can pick the right entity. Trust scores are NOT returned here; call cr_verify_carrier or cr_verify_broker on a match to get its trust score (that is the verified, metered lookup).

query.description: Legal name or identifier (MC, USDOT, CR ID, etc.). Required.

entity_type.description: Filter by entity type. 'any' returns both.
